title: Revisiting brand protection in India: The Birkin case study
description: Trademark protection and luxury brandsThe Delhi High Court’s decision in Hermes International v. Macky Lifestyle Pvt. Ltd. (2025) represents a major development in Indian trademark jurisprudence, particularly from the perspective of protection granted to luxury brands renowned worldwide. The present dispute arose out of a trademark infringement suit filed by Hermes International, along with its Indian subsidiary, against Macky Lifestyle Private Limited. Justice Tejas Karia, who formally declared
